title: 11 Herbal Teas For Hiatus Hernia
description: Lavandula angustifolia teas contains linalool and linalyl acetate, two compounds with soothing and anti-inflammatory properties. These properties help to calm the digestive system, reducing the pressure and discomfort that can come with a hiatus hernia. The anti-inflammatory properties of linalool and linalyl acetate can also help to reduce inflammation in the stomach, which can exacerbate hiatus hernia symptoms.
